---
name: settings-ui

---

Create a SaaS settings page.

Layout:

- Sectioned layout
- Vertical navigation (left)
- Content panel (right)

Include:

- Profile settings
- Notification toggles
- Theme selection
- Danger zone section

Accessibility:

- Proper labels
- Toggle keyboard accessible
- Field descriptions

Design:

- Clear hierarchy
- Section separation
- Calm SaaS aesthetic

Return structured components.
Code only.
